title: America's Beginning: A Historical Coloring Journey
description: This coloring page introduces young students to important symbols and figures from early American history in a simplified, engaging format.
instructions: Color each part of the picture using the suggested colors or choose your own. As you color, read the fun facts with a grown-up!

content.image: A composition showing the American flag being sewn by Betsy Ross, the Liberty Bell, a simplified colonial village with small houses, and children in colonial clothing playing games.

elements.name: American Flag
elements.description: Color the stars blue and the stripes red and white

elements.name: Liberty Bell
elements.description: Color the bell a golden brown color

elements.name: Colonial Houses
elements.description: Color the houses with brown, white, or red colors

elements.name: Children's Clothing
elements.description: Color the colonial outfits with simple colors

learningFacts: The American flag has 50 stars for our 50 states
The Liberty Bell is an important symbol of American freedom
In colonial times, children helped with chores and played different games than we do today
America officially became a country in 1776
